executor-api/package.json.summary: Package manifest describing a chatbot executor API with dependencies for Express, ESLint, CORS, and Nodemon, with scripts to start or run in development mode.

executor-api/server.js.summary: A Node.js/Express server that provides POST endpoints for syntax checking and linting JavaScript files with authentication via a token from environment variable RAILWAY_AUTH_TOKEN.

index.html.summary: HTML entry point for a 'Self-Recursive Bot' React application with mobile-responsive styles, import maps for React, ReactDOM, and Zustand libraries.

netlify.toml.summary: Netlify configuration defining build commands, deploy preview bypass, and edge function proxies for DeepSeek, OpenRouter, Firecrawl, LangSearch, executor, and GitHub token endpoints.

netlify/edge-functions/deepseek-proxy.js.summary: Netlify edge function that proxies POST requests to the DeepSeek chat completions API, supporting streaming SSE or JSON responses, and requiring a DEEPSEEK_API_KEY environment variable.

netlify/edge-functions/executor-proxy.js.summary: Netlify edge function that proxies POST requests to a Railway-hosted executor API, adding an auth token and forwarding the request body with the appropriate endpoint suffix.

netlify/edge-functions/firecrawl-proxy.j.summary: Netlify edge function that proxies POST requests to the Firecrawl search API, returning a list of search results with title, URL, snippet, and source.

netlify/edge-functions/github-token-prox.summary: Netlify edge function that returns a GitHub personal access token (GITHUB_PAT) from environment variables in a GET request, adding CORS headers.

netlify/edge-functions/langsearch-proxy..summary: Netlify edge function that proxies POST requests to the LangSearch web search API, forwarding the request body and returning the JSON response.

netlify/edge-functions/openrouter-proxy..summary: An edge function that proxies chat completion requests to OpenRouter API, handling both streaming and non-streaming responses while validating the API key and forwarding errors appropriately.

netlify/inject-preview-bypass.js.summary: A build script that injects a JavaScript snippet into index.html during Netlify deploy previews to automatically bypass the login gate and show the main app content.

preferences.json.summary: Configuration file for a self-improving bot that defines custom prompts, planning rules with decomposition threshold, code style preferences, and review strictness settings.

src/components/SimpleChat.js.summary: A React chat component that manages messages, tasks, and a pending command queue for a self-improving bot with workspace and provider state integration.

src/components/SimpleChat/Header.js.summary: A responsive header component displaying the bot name and repository/branch input fields with mobile-friendly layout adaptation.

src/components/SimpleChat/InputBar.js.summary: A chat input bar with send button that supports the /self-improve command and adapts layout for mobile devices with larger touch targets.

src/components/SimpleChat/MessageList.js.summary: A scrollable message list component that displays user and agent messages with responsive styling and automatic scrolling to the latest message.

src/components/SimpleChat/TaskList.js.summary: A scrollable task list component that displays task status (DONE, FAILED, in progress) with mobile-responsive layout and color-coded indicators.

src/components/SimpleChat/Toaster.js.summary: A fixed-position toast notification component that displays messages with error or success styling at the bottom center of the viewport.

src/core/SelfImprover.js.summary: Main orchestrator class for self-improvement that coordinates hierarchical task decomposition, persistent memory, dependency ordering, LLM calls, and full pipeline from planning to PR creation.

src/core/WorkingMemory.js.summary: WorkingMemory accumulates all information gathered during an agentic run, storing file summaries, notes, and keywords, with a toPromptContext() method that builds a compact text block for LLM prompts.

src/core/agenticExecutor.js.summary: agenticExecutor executes a single task using a read-before-write loop, allowing the LLM to request additional files before emitting the final code block, with all calls kept small and fast to avoid timeout.

src/core/agenticPlanner.js.summary: agenticPlanner explores a codebase to plan a change by iteratively reading candidate files based on LLM decisions, supporting hierarchical sub-goal support in the final plan prompt.

src/core/chunkedIndexer.js.summary: chunkedIndexer builds a keyword index for large repositories by processing files in groups of 10, extracting 5-10 keywords and a short summary per file using fast LLM completions, and committing the resulting keywords.json back to the repo.

src/core/clarification.js.summary: clarification.js generates 2-4 clarifying questions with a timeout, using the user's response or falling back to the original goal if unanswered within 30 seconds.

src/core/coordinatedPlanner.js.summary: coordinatedPlanner creates a multi-agent plan by grouping candidate files by directory, launching parallel exploration agents per directory, then merging summaries into a single plan with optional sub-goals for hierarchical execution.

src/core/fileDiscovery.js.summary: fileDiscovery discovers relevant files by matching goal keywords against a pre-built keyword index or fallback filename scan, scoring and returning the top 8 matching files.

src/core/hierarchicalPlanner.js.summary: hierarchicalPlanner extends existing planners by decomposing complex goals into sub-goals based on an architectural decision, then initializing a task queue with the sub-goal tasks.

src/core/keywordIndexer.js.summary: keywordIndexer provides command indexing and fuzzy matching via Levenshtein distance, returning the best matching command with a normalized score for autocomplete or command resolution.

src/core/manifestManager.js.summary: manifestManager ensures a manifest is available by loading manifest.json from the repo or building it from source files when missing, caching the result in the context object.

src/services/llmProvider.js.summary: LLMProvider is a singleton service that calls language models (DeepSeek or OpenRouter) through Netlify edge proxies with a 20-second timeout, fast-model override, pass-through of thinking mode and reasoning effort, and user-friendly error handling.

src/services/smokeTest.js.summary: SmokeTest polls a Netlify deploy-preview URL until the page renders correctly (contains id="root" and no SyntaxError) or times out, with methods to build the preview URL and run a full smoke test for a given PR and site name.

src/stores/providerStore.js.summary: A Zustand store with persistence that manages the LLM provider selection (DeepSeek/OpenRouter), model name, thinking mode toggle, and reasoning effort setting, with automatic model reset when the provider changes.

src/stores/workspaceStore.js.summary: A Zustand store with persistence that holds workspace state including the current repository, branch, GitHub token, and a flag to remember credentials across sessions.

src/utils/agentSkills.js.summary: processAgentSkills parses an AI reply for custom <skill> tags (update_editor and read_file), extracts the file path and content from each, and replaces the tags with descriptive notes in the modified reply.

src/utils/contextBuilder.js.summary: ContextBuilder identifies required files from a dependency manifest (adding imports/importedBy for target files up to a max), then builds a context string with full target file contents and interface-only related files within a token budget.

src/utils/manifestBuilder.js.summary: ManifestBuilder constructs a dependency graph for JavaScript files by extracting ES module exports and imports, resolving relative import paths, and computing reverse dependencies (importedBy).

src/utils/sandboxTest.js.summary: testCodeSandbox executes code in a sandboxed iframe with pre-loaded modules (GitHubService, LLMProvider, etc.) and a timeout, resolving false on error or time expiry; it attempts to instantiate and health-check a SelfImprover class.

src/utils/stripComments.js.summary: stripComments removes JavaScript and CSS comments (both block and line) and blank lines from code using regular expressions to reduce prompt size.
